name: Rocky Road Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a saucepan, heat margarine over low heat until melted. Stir in half of the chocolate chips and remove from heat, allowing it to cool.
3. Mix the remaining chocolate chips with the cooled melted mixture and other ingredients (sugar, chopped nuts, baking powder, vanilla, salt, and eggs) until combined.
4. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Press one marshmallow into the center of each dollop.
6. Bake for about 8 minutes or until no indentation remains when touched.
7. Remove from the cookie sheet immediately and let cool on a wire rack.
Makes approximately 4 dozen cookies.
